title: Cisco's stock pops 17% on surging AI orders, as company says it's cutting almost 4,000 jobs
summary_full: Cisco's AI story has finally started resonating with Wall Street, with the stock hitting a record late last year and continuing to rally in 2026.
summary_public: Cisco's AI story has finally started resonating with Wall Street, with the stock hitting a record late last year and continuing to rally in 2026.
